caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium, delivering a speech against a backdrop of dark green, textured stone walls with a geometric pattern. He is dressed in a light-colored, long-sleeved Nehru jacket over a matching shirt and wears glasses. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the initial sequence, he is captured gesturing with his right hand raised while speaking. As the scene progresses, he lowers his hand, resting it on the podium, and continues to speak, his expression remaining focused. The camera remains static throughout, capturing him from the waist up. There are no logos or on-screen text visible in the frames. The lighting is consistent, highlighting his white beard and the neutral tones of his attire against the dark, mottled green background.
